name: Michael Hutchence
title: Michael Hutchence, video still from practice on 11/21/1997, found dead of suicide the next day 11/22/1997, 37
description: Michael Hutchence, video still from practice on 11/21/1997, found dead of suicide the next day 11/22/1997, 37
bio: Michael Hutchence was an Australian musician and the lead singer of the rock band INXS. His dynamic stage presence and soulful voice helped make INXS one of the biggest bands of the 1980s and early 1990s.
